description: From is example.com but the SPF-authenticated envelope-from (smtp.mailfrom) is evil.test. No Return-Path header is present, so the envelope-sender-agreement comparison is skipped (null) — isolating the smtp.mailfrom/From comparison. The mismatch is a low-severity 'consistency' hint carrying fromDomain, the full smtpMailfromDomains list, and the divergent-domain subset.

authentication-results: mx.example.net; spf=pass smtp.mailfrom=evil.test; dmarc=pass header.from=example.com; dkim=pass header.d=example.com

authenticationResults.raw: mx.example.net; spf=pass smtp.mailfrom=evil.test; dmarc=pass header.from=example.com; dkim=pass header.d=example.com

signals.message: SPF smtp.mailfrom domain differs from the From domain.
